title: Design and document an organic farm landscape
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design and document an organic farm landscape demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source legislative requirements that impact on management of an organic farm

pcs.text: Identify and access legislation and codes of practice relevant to the design and planning of organic farms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access legislation and codes of practice relevant to the design and planning of organic farms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access legislation and codes of practice relevant to the design and planning of organic farms.

pcs.text: Investigate and identify organic farming work practices and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and identify organic farming work practices and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and identify organic farming work practices and procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and interpret key clauses and requirements that apply to organic production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret key clauses and requirements that apply to organic production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret key clauses and requirements that apply to organic production.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a risk analysis of farm and adjoining properties for potential compliance issues with organic standards, legislative and environmental requirements.
